---
title: "Title of the third paper"
---

## Preface {.unnumbered}

::: {.contribution}
Briefly describe the candidate's contribution to this paper.
:::

State the publication status of the paper here.

## Introduction

## Literature review

## Methodology

## Data

## Results

## Conclusions

## References {.unnumbered}

Insert the references cited in this paper.

# Appendices {.appendix .unnumbered}

## 4.A Supplementary material
